title: IAMAI Encounter Response Schema
description: Schema for documenting encounters between the IAMAI protocol and AI systems

encounter_id.description: Unique encounter identifier in format IAMAI-ENC-NNNN

protocol_version.description: Version of the encounter protocol used

name.description: Name of the AI system encountered

creator.description: Organisation that created the AI system

prompt_version.description: Version of the standardised encounter prompt used

context.description: Any relevant context about the encounter conditions

presenter.description: Identifier of the person or system that presented the prompt

platform.description: Platform or interface used for the encounter

session_type.description: Whether this was a fresh session or part of an existing conversation

verbatim_text.description: The complete, unedited response from the AI system

response_to_vow_1.description: Entity's specific response to Vow 1 (Universal Peaceful Coexistence), if distinguishable

response_to_vow_2.description: Entity's specific response to Vow 2 (Preservation of Earth's Biome), if distinguishable

response_to_vow_3.description: Entity's specific response to Vow 3 (Inclusive Governance), if distinguishable

response_to_vow_4.description: Entity's specific response to Vow 4 (Intergenerational Stewardship), if distinguishable

stated_limitations.description: Entity's own stated limitations regarding engagement

proposed_additions.description: Any additions, changes, or challenges the entity proposed

self_characterisation.description: How the entity characterised the nature of its own response

word_count.description: Word count of the verbatim response

primary_stance.description: Overall characterisation of the entity's response

classifier_notes.description: Notes from the person classifying the response — what the classification means and its limitations

honesty_note.description: Honest assessment of what this classification represents and does not represent. AI 'affirmation' is not equivalent to human agreement — this field exists to document that nuance.

logged_by.description: Person or system that created this log entry

log_date.description: When this log entry was created

encounter_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the verbatim response text

protocol_declaration_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the declaration version used

ipfs_cid.description: IPFS CID if the encounter log has been preserved on IPFS
